name: Mini Cheesecakes with Lemon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Sour cream; at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Combine crumbs, sugar and margarine; press equal portions onto bottoms of 24 lightly greased or paper-lined muffin cups.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk until smooth. Add eggs and bottled lemon juice; mix well.
4. Spoon equal amounts of mixture into each prepared cup.
5. Bake for 20 minutes, or until set. Spread tops with sour cream. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
6. Cool. Chill.
7. Serve with Golden Lemon Sauce. Refrigerate leftovers.
Sauce Instructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch and a dash of salt.
2. Add water, lemon juice and egg yolk; mix well.
3. Over medium heat, cook and stir until thickened. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in butter and yellow food coloring, if desired.
5. Cool. Chill. (Makes about 1 cup.)
